name: CeloSave
description: MiniPay-native savings app on Celo. Deposit stablecoins (USDT, USDC, cUSD) into Aave V3 and earn yield automatically, set non-custodial recurring Auto-Save deposits, and top up mobile airtime across six African countries — all without holding CELO for gas. Exposes a paid analytics endpoint over x402 (GET /api/analytics/protocol, $0.001 USDC per request).

endpoints.description: x402-metered protocol analytics — $0.001 USDC per request via X-PAYMENT header
payTo address for x402 analytics payments
